metadata.description: agent-second-brain: a self-organizing AI second brain for Obsidian + Claude Code. A persistent, compounding wiki vault of plain Markdown you own, based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

plugins.name: agent-second-brain
plugins.description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Ships: default Obsidian CLI transport, hybrid retrieval (Anthropic Sept 2024 contextual retrieval pattern: BM25 + cosine rerank), per-file advisory locking for multi-writer safety, pre-commit verifier agent, and methodology modes (LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten / Generic). Optional DragonScale Memory extension. Pairs with kepano/obsidian-skills (recommended) for canonical Obsidian primitives.
